title: Examination of reports
doc_html:
§467. Examination of reports

            The board shall examine the reports filed with it as to their compliance with the requirements of the law. Any formal hearing, court proceeding, or other cause of action against a cemetery authority or trustee based on any report filed by it shall be commenced within the limitations of R.S. 37:21.

            Acts 1974, No. 417, §1; Acts 2023, No. 381, §1.
doc_text:
§467.  Examination of reports
The board shall examine the reports filed with it as to their compliance with the
requirements of the law.  Any formal hearing, court proceeding, or other cause of action
against a cemetery authority or trustee based on any report filed by it shall be commenced
within the limitations of R.S. 37:21.
Acts 1974, No. 417, §1; Acts 2023, No. 381, §1.
